title: ICH Q9: A Four-Step QRM Workflow
alt: Four-step ICH Q9 quality risk management workflow

items.label: Define question & scope
items.desc: State the specific decision the assessment must inform.

items.label: Assess the risk
items.desc: Identify hazards; make severity, probability, detectability explicit.

items.label: Control the risk
items.desc: Reduce or accept each risk; state residual risk clearly.

items.label: Communicate & review
items.desc: Share outputs; tie review to change control triggers.
